theory.canonical_statement: ID5204 records Charge Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\CSV\TZPID_KDP_batches\TZPID_KDP_batch_0007.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

unrealized_section_cleanup.reason: no generated Wolfram, derivation, or proof artifact is included until real source-backed content exists

proof_pipeline.scope_note: This metadata records authorship, lineage, and proof-pipeline artifact links. It does not by itself assert that the entry has a completed native analytic proof.

id_system.loc_class: QC - Physics: plasma and electromagnetic fields

blocks.wolfram_input: HoldForm[TZPIDCanonicalLatex["ID5204", 1, "$\\hat{\\mathcal{Q} \\mathcal{L}(t)=\\mathcal{L} {0}+\\epsilon\\mathcal{L} {1}(\\hat{n}(t)) \\subsection*{[ID 0766] THE QUARK-GLUON PLASMA RESIDUE OPERATOR ($"]]
normalization_notes: Carrier form preserves exact LaTeX as Wolfram string data
Semantic/numeric interpretation remains a later domain-specific upgrade

carrier_semantics.claim: The block is a valid Wolfram carrier for the source equation text; it is not yet a domain-specific computational proof.

wolfram_representation.scope: per-ID numeric atom and symbolic token representation with best-effort Wolfram candidates

blocks.wolfram_input: HoldForm[TZPIDWolframRepresentation["ID5204", 1, <|"kind" -> "symbolic_token_index", "title" -> "Charge Relation", "latex" -> "$\\hat{\\mathcal{Q} \\mathcal{L}(t)=\\mathcal{L} {0}+\\epsilon\\mathcal{L} {1}(\\hat{n}(t)) \\subsection*{[ID 0766] THE QUARK-GLUON PLASMA RESIDUE OPERATOR ($", "numericAtoms" -> {0, 1, 0766}, "symbolicTokens" -> {"hat", "epsilon", "subsection", "t", "ID", "QUARK", "GLUON", "PLASMA", "RESIDUE", "OPERATOR"}, "candidateWolframInput" -> "", "candidateMethod" -> "commutator_or_list_notation_requires_semantic_translation"|>]]

summary.candidate_policy: best_effort_candidates_parse_checked; unparseable candidates downgraded to symbolic token representation
